JAX sparse-factor setup was expensive and the residual was worse than the host-factor path

code_kept.change: GMRES fallback may reuse a non-GMRES candidate initial guess only when the candidate improves the RHS norm and the preconditioning side is not right-preconditioned.
code_kept.reason: safe correctness/performance guard; prevents discarding useful left-preconditioned states while avoiding wrong right-PC coordinates

code_rejected.reason: failed the bounded GPU gate and remains default-off blocker evidence rather than a production path

next_algorithmic_need: A stronger GPU-compatible global-coupling preconditioner or a real assembled/operator-reuse path is required; further Krylov-method toggles and timeout increases are not justified by these probes.
